message:
Remove Docker from CI (#135)

Use `uvx tenzir-test` directly instead of running inside the Tenzir
Docker image.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,13 +1,6 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 set -eo pipefail
 
-workspace="$(pwd)"
 packages=("$@")
 
-docker run --rm \
-  -e UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache \
-  -e XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/xdg-data \
-  -v "${workspace}:/workspace" \
-  -w /workspace \
-  --entrypoint uv \
-  tenzir/tenzir tool run tenzir-test "${packages[@]}"
+uvx tenzir-test "${packages[@]}"

@@ -17,9 +17,6 @@ jobs:
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
 
-      - name: Pull Tenzir Docker image
-        run: docker pull tenzir/tenzir
-
       - name: Detect touched packages
         id: touched
         shell: bash
